auth_config.notes: Auto-confirm enabled. Demo accounts also exist (jane.cooper@deskflow.io, alex.admin@deskflow.io) with password demo1234.

tests.title: Landing page renders with key sections
tests.description: Verify the landing page renders hero, features, FAQ, and footer sections
steps: Step 2: Wait for page to load
Step 4: Scroll down and verify features section exists
tests.expected_result: Landing page renders all major sections without errors
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='page-landing' is visible AND text 'Your office, organized' is visible AND text 'Features' is visible

tests.title: Landing page CTA navigates to app
tests.description: Verify 'Get started free' link navigates to /app which redirects to login
tests.expected_result: User is redirected to /login since they are not authenticated
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/login' OR element with data-testid='page-login' is visible

tests.title: Login page renders with form and demo buttons
tests.description: Verify login page shows email/password form and demo account buttons
tests.expected_result: Login page shows form fields and demo buttons
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='page-login' is visible AND data-testid='login-email' is visible AND data-testid='login-password' is visible AND data-testid='login-submit' is visible AND data-testid='demo-login-user' is visible AND data-testid='demo-login-admin' is visible

tests.title: Login with valid email/password as user role
tests.description: Verify successful login with test user credentials navigates to dashboard
tests.expected_result: User is logged in and sees the dashboard
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app' AND element with data-testid='page-dashboard' is visible within 10 seconds

tests.title: Login with valid email/password as admin role
tests.description: Verify successful login with admin credentials shows admin nav items
steps: Step 6: Verify admin nav items are visible in sidebar
tests.expected_result: Admin user is logged in and sees admin navigation items
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app' AND element with data-testid='page-dashboard' is visible AND element with data-testid='nav-admin-manage-office' is visible

tests.title: Login with invalid credentials shows error
tests.description: Verify that wrong credentials display an error message
tests.expected_result: Error message appears on the login page
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='login-error' is visible AND URL still contains '/login'

tests.title: Demo login button works for employee role
tests.description: Verify clicking the Employee demo button logs in and navigates to dashboard
tests.expected_result: User is logged in as employee and sees the dashboard
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app' AND element with data-testid='page-dashboard' is visible within 15 seconds

tests.title: Logout redirects to login page
tests.description: Verify clicking sign out navigates back to login
tests.expected_result: User is signed out and redirected to login page
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/login' AND element with data-testid='page-login' is visible

tests.title: Protected route redirects when not logged in
tests.description: Verify accessing /app without auth redirects to login
tests.expected_result: User is redirected to login page
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/login' within 5 seconds

tests.title: Session persists after page refresh
tests.description: Verify user stays logged in after refreshing the page
steps: Step 3: Wait for page to load
tests.expected_result: User remains on the dashboard after refresh
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='page-dashboard' is visible within 10 seconds AND URL contains '/app'

tests.title: Dashboard renders with greeting, stats, and quick actions
tests.description: Verify dashboard shows greeting, quick stats, today's booking card, and quick actions
steps: Step 2: Wait for skeleton to disappear and content to load
tests.expected_result: Dashboard shows all sections
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='page-dashboard' is visible AND text containing 'Good' (greeting) is visible AND data-testid='quick-book-desk' is visible

tests.title: Sidebar navigation to floor map page
tests.description: Verify clicking Floor map nav item navigates correctly
tests.expected_result: Floor map page renders
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app/floor-map' AND element with data-testid='page-floor-map' is visible within 5 seconds

tests.title: Sidebar navigation to my bookings page
tests.description: Verify clicking My bookings nav item navigates correctly
tests.expected_result: My bookings page renders
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app/bookings' AND element with data-testid='page-my-bookings' is visible within 5 seconds

tests.title: Sidebar navigation to team page
tests.description: Verify clicking Team nav item navigates correctly
tests.expected_result: Team page renders with member cards
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app/team' AND element with data-testid='page-team' is visible within 5 seconds

tests.title: Sidebar navigation to planner page
tests.description: Verify clicking My week nav item navigates correctly
tests.expected_result: Planner page renders with week cards
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app/planner' AND element with data-testid='page-planner' is visible within 5 seconds

tests.title: Sidebar navigation to resources page
tests.description: Verify clicking Parking & lockers nav item navigates correctly
tests.expected_result: Resources page renders
tests.pass_criteria: URL contains '/app/resources' AND element with data-testid='page-resources' is visible within 5 seconds

tests.title: Deep link to floor map works
tests.description: Verify directly navigating to /app/floor-map loads the page
steps: Step 2: Wait for page to load
tests.expected_result: Floor map page renders without errors
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='page-floor-map' is visible within 10 seconds

tests.title: Unknown app route shows 404 page
tests.description: Verify navigating to a non-existent app route shows the 404 page
steps: Step 2: Wait for page to load
tests.expected_result: 404 page is shown with a link back to dashboard
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='page-not-found' is visible AND text '404' is visible AND data-testid='not-found-go-dashboard' is visible

tests.title: Quick book desk button opens booking wizard
tests.description: Verify the 'Book a desk' quick action opens the full-screen booking wizard
steps: Step 2: Wait for dashboard to load
Step 4: Wait for wizard to appear
tests.expected_result: Booking wizard opens as a full-screen overlay
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='booking-wizard' is visible AND text 'Book a desk' is visible AND text 'Step 1' is visible

tests.title: Wizard step 1 — select date and time, proceed to step 2
tests.description: Verify selecting a date chip and time preset enables the next button
steps: Step 1: Open booking wizard via data-testid='quick-book-desk'
Step 2: Verify 'Today' date chip is selected by default
Step 3: Click the 'Full day' time preset
Step 4: Verify the availability hint shows desk count
tests.expected_result: Wizard advances to step 2 showing the floor map
tests.pass_criteria: Text 'Pick your seat' is visible AND text 'Step 2' is visible

tests.title: Wizard close button dismisses the wizard
tests.description: Verify clicking the X button closes the wizard overlay
steps: Step 1: Open booking wizard via data-testid='quick-book-desk'
tests.expected_result: Wizard is dismissed and dashboard is visible again
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='booking-wizard' is NOT visible AND data-testid='page-dashboard' is visible

tests.title: Wizard step 2 — next button disabled until resource selected
tests.description: Verify the 'Review booking' button is disabled when no desk is selected
steps: Step 1: Open booking wizard and advance to step 2
Step 3: Check that data-testid='wizard-next-step-2' is disabled
tests.expected_result: Review booking button is disabled until a desk is selected
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='wizard-next-step-2' has the 'disabled' attribute

tests.title: My bookings page renders with tabs

steps: Step 2: Wait for content to load
tests.expected_result: Bookings page shows with three tabs
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='page-my-bookings' is visible AND text 'Upcoming' is visible AND text 'Past' is visible AND text 'Waitlist' is visible

tests.title: Switching to past tab shows past bookings or empty state
tests.description: Verify clicking the Past tab changes the displayed content
steps: Step 3: Wait for content to update
tests.expected_result: Past bookings are shown or empty state message appears
tests.pass_criteria: Either a booking card is visible OR element with data-testid='empty-state' is visible containing text about past bookings

tests.title: Waitlist tab shows empty state when no waitlist entries
tests.description: Verify the waitlist tab shows an empty message for new users
tests.expected_result: Waitlist tab shows empty state
tests.pass_criteria: Text 'not on any waitlists' is visible

tests.title: Floor map renders with floor selector and date picker

tests.title: Calendar page renders with view mode toggle

steps: Step 2: Wait for content to load
tests.expected_result: Calendar renders with view mode buttons and date navigation
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='page-calendar' is visible AND text 'Day' is visible AND text 'Week' is visible AND text 'Month' is visible

tests.title: Calendar view mode switching works
tests.description: Verify switching between day, week, and month views changes the display
steps: Step 3: Verify week view content appears
Step 5: Verify month view content appears
tests.expected_result: View changes between day, week, and month displays
tests.pass_criteria: After clicking 'Month', a month grid or month date range label is visible

tests.title: Resources page renders with parking and locker tabs
tests.description: Verify resources page shows parking and locker tabs with items
steps: Step 2: Wait for content to load

steps: Step 3: Wait for content to update

tests.title: Analytics page renders for admin with charts

steps: Step 2: Wait for page to load

steps: Step 2: Wait for page to load

tests.title: Notification center opens and shows notifications

steps: Step 2: Wait for popover to appear

tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='notifications-panel' is visible AND text 'Notifications' is visible

tests.title: Notification filter tabs work
tests.description: Verify clicking filter tabs (All, Bookings, Reminders, Alerts) filters the list
steps: Step 2: Verify 'All' filter is active by default
tests.expected_result: Notification list filters by category
tests.pass_criteria: After clicking 'Bookings', the panel is still visible and the list has changed (either different count or different content)

tests.title: Mobile viewport — hamburger menu opens sidebar
tests.description: Verify the mobile hamburger menu opens the sidebar sheet at 375px width
steps: Step 3: Verify sidebar is hidden (desktop sidebar not visible)
Step 4: Click the hamburger menu button (aria-label='Open menu')
Step 5: Verify sidebar sheet opens with nav items
tests.expected_result: Mobile sidebar sheet opens with navigation links
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='sidebar-nav' is visible within a sheet overlay AND data-testid='nav-dashboard' is visible

tests.title: Mobile viewport — dashboard content visible without overlap
tests.description: Verify dashboard renders properly at mobile width
steps: Step 3: Wait for dashboard to load
tests.expected_result: Dashboard content is visible and not overflowing
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='page-dashboard' is visible AND data-testid='quick-book-desk' is visible within viewport bounds

tests.title: Tablet viewport — login page layout
tests.description: Verify login page renders properly at 768px width
tests.expected_result: Login form and demo buttons are visible and usable
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='login-email' is visible AND data-testid='demo-login-user' is visible

tests.title: Planner day card toggles between office and remote
tests.description: Verify clicking a day card toggles its in-office/remote state
steps: Step 2: Wait for content to load
Step 3: Find a day card showing 'Remote'
Step 5: Verify it now shows 'In office'
tests.expected_result: Day card toggles between remote and in-office state
tests.pass_criteria: After clicking, the card text changes to 'In office' AND a 'Book a desk' button becomes visible within that card

tests.title: Calendar today button resets to current date
tests.description: Verify clicking the Today button returns to today's date after navigating away
steps: Step 2: Click the forward arrow to go to next day
Step 3: Verify the date label changed
Step 5: Verify the date returns to today
tests.expected_result: Calendar resets to today's date
tests.pass_criteria: The date label contains today's date string (day name or date number matching current date)

tests.title: Login form inputs have labels and are keyboard focusable
tests.description: Verify login form inputs have associated labels and can be tabbed through
steps: Step 2: Verify email input has associated label (htmlFor='email' or aria-label)
Step 3: Verify password input has associated label
Step 4: Press Tab to verify focus moves through email → password → submit
tests.expected_result: All form inputs have labels and are keyboard accessible
tests.pass_criteria: The label element with text 'Email' exists with htmlFor='email' AND label with text 'Password' exists with htmlFor='password' AND Tab key moves focus through form fields

tests.title: Error boundary catches render errors gracefully
tests.description: Verify the app does not show a white screen when a component error occurs — the error boundary shows a fallback UI
steps: Step 2: Verify the dashboard loads without errors
Step 3: Check that no uncaught exceptions appear in console that would cause a white screen
tests.expected_result: Dashboard renders with all sections wrapped in error boundaries
tests.pass_criteria: Element with data-testid='page-dashboard' is visible AND no white/blank screen occurs AND data-testid='app-shell' is visible
